note: ranking-signal comparison on identical broad pools (deployed pipeline candidate pool ranked by filter*gen=learned vs the rule frequency prior=SyGMa-style). At narrow breadth prior~=filter; as breadth grows the LEARNED filter pulls ahead (top_k=300: 0.413 vs 0.374), so GRAIL's ranking model is not the deficit. pool_coverage is rank-independent (see selection_ablation.json). n=245 subset.
